headline: Is Nvidia (NVDA) Fairly Priced After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: With NVIDIA often in the spotlight, the real question for you is simple: is the current US$205.10 share price offering fair value for the business you are actually buying? Recently, the stock has been a bit softer in the short term, with the price down 2.9% over the last week and 4.7% over the last month, even though the year to date return sits at 8.6% and the 1 year return at 44.9%, while the 3 year gain is very large.
